data.title: 国际服一周年直播「Kivotos’ 1st Anniversary Celebration Party」
data.summary: [Special Broadcast Notice for Kivotos’ 1st Anniversary Celebration] Sensei, in celebration of our 1s
data.body:
[Special Broadcast Notice for Kivotos’ 1st Anniversary Celebration]

Sensei, in celebration of our 1st Anniversary, 
we’ve prepared a special live broadcast!
Please stay tuned for the details!

https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101732

#BlueArchive![a5HXLN7auOlM48ooROB8bZB3Xk1c195N.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/a5HXLN7auOlM48ooROB8bZB3Xk1c195N.png)

[Kivotos’ 1st Anniversary Celebration Party]

Special live broadcast will begin soon!!
Please check our Official YouTube Channel🎉

Broadcast Time: 10/28(Fri) 10:00 AM (UTC)
⬇️Official YouTube⬇️
https://youtu.be/lJ4XwSvi-gk
*The broadcast will be simultaneously interpreted in English.
